discussion_comments.comment_body:
Add `tre` to include paths
EDIT: Actualy `-I../deps/tre/local_includes`
because there is a regex.h, It will conflict with <regrex.h>.

commented_code:
-# Fallback to gcc/g++ when $CC or $CXX is not in $PATH.
+# fast_float - C implementation for Redis
+# This replaces the C++ version with a pure C implementation.
+
 CC ?= gcc
-CXX ?= g++
 
-WARN=-Wall
+WARN=-Wall -Wextra
 OPT=-O3
-STD=-std=c++11
-DEFS=-DFASTFLOAT_ALLOWS_LEADING_PLUS
 
-FASTFLOAT_CFLAGS=$(WARN) $(OPT) $(STD) $(DEFS) $(CFLAGS)
-FASTFLOAT_LDFLAGS=$(LDFLAGS)
+FAST_FLOAT_CFLAGS=$(WARN) $(OPT) $(CFLAGS)

discussion_comments.comment_body:
still need `STD=-std=c99`, otherwise will build fail with old build chain.
```
fast_float_strtod.c:61:5: error: 'for' loop initial declarations are only allowed in C99 mode
     for (size_t i = 0; i < n; i++) {
     ^
```
